children.name: RegisterPatient
children.purpose: Validate required fields, create patient record, and generate unique patient_id
children.behavior: Check that name, dob, contact, insurance are present and non-empty; generate a new patient_id; store patient data in patients database; return success with patient_id

global_vars.description: Write new patient record to patients store

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient record is created in patients store

children.name: BookAppointment
children.purpose: Check patient exists, check doctor availability, create appointment record, send confirmation
children.behavior: Verify patient_id exists in patients database; check that appointment_time is not in the past; check doctor availability (no conflicting appointments); create appointment record with status 'confirmed'; return success with appointment details

global_vars.description: Read patient record to verify existence
Read existing appointments for availability check; write new appointment record

constraints.description: Appointment time must not be in the past
Doctor must not have conflicting appointment at same time

acceptance_criteria.description: Appointment record is created in appointments store

children.name: RetrieveRecords
children.purpose: Retrieve all medical records for a patient, sorted by date descending
children.behavior: Look up patient_id in records database; collect all records for that patient; sort by timestamp descending; return list of records

global_vars.description: Read all records for the patient

constraints.description: Records must be returned sorted by timestamp descending

acceptance_criteria.description: All records for the patient are returned sorted by date

children.name: UpdatePatientProfile
children.purpose: Update patient profile fields, validate insurance change against external system
children.behavior: Update provided fields in patients database; if insurance field is present, validate against external system before saving; return success with updated data

global_vars.description: Read existing patient record; write updated fields

constraints.description: Insurance change must be validated against external system before saving

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient profile is updated in patients store

governance_notes: Parent global_vars conservation verified: patients (read_write) covered by RegisterPatient (write), BookAppointment (read), UpdatePatientProfile (read_write). appointments (read_write) covered by BookAppointment (read_write). records (read_write) covered by RetrieveRecords (read). Note: records write operation is not assigned to any child as no child creates or modifies records in the current decomposition. If records write is required by parent, a new child or modification would be needed.
